name: @vanillagreen/pi-caveman
description: Native Pi caveman communication mode with session persistence, slash command control, status badge, and settings-manager integration.

settings.label: Enable caveman by default
settings.description: Start sessions in the configured default caveman mode unless a session override says otherwise.

settings.label: Default mode
settings.description: Mode used when enabling caveman with no explicit mode.

settings.label: Auto clarity escape
settings.description: Temporarily use normal clarity for destructive/security/clarification turns.

settings.label: Resume after clarity escape
settings.description: Keep caveman mode active after a temporary clarity escape.

settings.label: Allow session override
settings.description: Allow /caveman to override manager defaults in the current session.

settings.label: Normal code output
settings.description: Tell the model to keep code and code blocks normal.

settings.label: Normal commits
settings.description: Tell the model to keep commit messages normal unless explicitly asked otherwise.

settings.label: Normal reviews
settings.description: Tell the model to keep formal reviews/PR text normal unless explicitly asked otherwise.

settings.label: Custom prompt suffix
settings.description: Extra instruction appended to caveman prompt injection.

author: vanillagreen
